email: Amazon Global Logistics Recruitment Program  Amazon is expanding its global remote logistics support team. We are currently hiring remote associates to assist our international delivery operations.  Position: Remote Logistics Coordination Assistant Location: Work From Home  Responsibilities: • Monitor shipment tracking systems • Update logistics records • Verify delivery confirmations in our online dashboard  Compensation: Earn $450 per day working just 2–3 hours daily.  Benefits: • No prior experience required • Flexible working hours • Immediate hiring • Weekly performance bonuses  Recruitment Process: Due to the high volume of applicants, candidates must complete a quick account verification before accessing the logistics platform.  A small refundable verification fee of $75 is required to activate your employee dashboard.  Please apply immediately as positions are limited.  Recruitment Contact: amazon.remote.jobs@consultant-recruitment.xyz
